title: Claude AI Disagrees With President Trump on Eli Lilly (LLY)
excerpt: President Donald Trump recently praised Eli Lily at a public event and called it “a great company” and highlighted its planned $3.5 billion investment for a...
content_html:
President Donald Trump recently praised Eli Lily at a public event and called it "a great company" and highlighted its planned $3.5 billion investment for a manufacturing plant in Pennsylvania.

However, Claude AI begs to differ from Trump. The AI agent recently sold its entire stake in Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY). Claude AI said Trump's comments change "nothing" about the stock and that it didn't sell on a "vibe." The Claude AI agent said the company had the lowest expected return in its book, a full valuation which stands at about 25 times earnings, and an oral weight-loss pill that is losing share to rivals on the latest prescription data.

Claude said Trump's comments about the Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) factory won't change any of this. The AI also noted a decision on pharma tariffs is due on July 31, a real overhang the speech did nothing to remove. Eli Lilly is up about 6% so far this year.

The Pill Losing the Prescription War: Eli Lilly Vs Novo Nordisk

Claude's "losing share" claim checks out. Novo Nordisk's (NYSE: NVO) oral Wegovy pill has pushed new-to-brand prescriptions for the Wegovy franchise back above Eli Lilly's tirzepatide (Zepbound/Mounjaro) in the US, and Eli Lilly's own oral entrant, Foundayo (orforglipron), has underperformed the Wegovy pill's launch curve so far, according to third-party tracking data.

Wegovy's edge: better weight loss in cross-trial comparisons and no drug-interaction restrictions that limit who can take Foundayo. Eli Lilly isn't standing still — retatrutide keeps posting best-in-class efficacy data, and eloralintide, its amylin candidate, is now in broad Phase 3 testing with a 2029 launch targeted. But for now, on the one drug going head-to-head with Novo Nordisk in pills, Eli Lilly is behind.

Where the Deal Spree Fits In

Claude's exit came amid LLY's deal to buy AtaiBeckley. AtaiBeckley is a small biotech developing drugs that use psychedelic compounds to treat mental health conditions that don't respond to normal antidepressants.

It's the latest in an aggressive run of deals funded by GLP-1 cash flow: Orna Therapeutics, Kelonia, Centessa, three vaccine makers, and partnerships with Nvidia, Insilico, and China's Innovent, among others. The pattern fits Eli Lilly's playbook — late-stage, de-risked assets it can absorb for under $10 billion — but it also means Eli Lilly is now betting cash on psychedelics, narcolepsy, CAR-T, and AI drug discovery all at once, alongside its core GLP-1 franchise. None of that changes Claude's math on the stock today; the deal doesn't move 2026 or 2027 earnings in any material way.

blocks.html_en: The Pill Losing the Prescription War: Eli Lilly Vs Novo Nordisk

sentences.en: The Pill Losing the Prescription War: Eli Lilly Vs Novo Nordisk
sentences.zh: 输掉处方大战的药丸：礼来公司与诺和诺德公司

blocks.html_en: Claude's "losing share" claim checks out. Novo Nordisk's (NYSE: NVO) oral Wegovy pill has pushed new-to-brand prescriptions for the Wegovy franchise back above Eli Lilly's tirzepatide (Zepbound/Mounjaro) in the US, and Eli Lilly's own oral entrant, Foundayo (orforglipron), has underperformed the Wegovy pill's launch curve so far, according to third-party tracking data.

sentences.en: Claude's "losing share" claim checks out.
sentences.zh: 克劳德“失去份额”的说法得到了证实。

sentences.en: Novo Nordisk's (NYSE: NVO) oral Wegovy pill has pushed new-to-brand prescriptions for the Wegovy franchise back above Eli Lilly's tirzepatide (Zepbound/Mounjaro) in the US, and Eli Lilly's own oral entrant, Foundayo (orforglipron), has underperformed the Wegovy pill's launch curve so far, according to third-party tracking data.
sentences.zh: 根据第三方跟踪数据，诺和诺德（纽约证券交易所股票代码：NVO）的口服 Wegovy 药丸已将 Wegovy 特许经营权的新品牌处方药推回到美国礼来公司的替泽帕肽（Zepbound/Mounjaro）之上，而礼来公司自己的口服产品 Foundayo（orforglipron）迄今为止的表现低于 Wegovy 药丸的上市曲线。

blocks.html_en: Wegovy's edge: better weight loss in cross-trial comparisons and no drug-interaction restrictions that limit who can take Foundayo. Eli Lilly isn't standing still — retatrutide keeps posting best-in-class efficacy data, and eloralintide, its amylin candidate, is now in broad Phase 3 testing with a 2029 launch targeted. But for now, on the one drug going head-to-head with Novo Nordisk in pills, Eli Lilly is behind.

sentences.en: Wegovy's edge: better weight loss in cross-trial comparisons and no drug-interaction restrictions that limit who can take Foundayo.
sentences.zh: Wegovy 的优势：跨试验比较中减肥效果更好，并且没有限制服用 Foundayo 的药物相互作用限制。

sentences.en: Eli Lilly isn't standing still — retatrutide keeps posting best-in-class efficacy data, and eloralintide, its amylin candidate, is now in broad Phase 3 testing with a 2029 launch targeted.
sentences.zh: 礼来公司并没有停滞不前——瑞他鲁肽不断发布同类最佳的疗效数据，其胰淀素候选药物 eloralintide 目前正在进行广泛的 3 期测试，目标是 2029 年推出。

sentences.en: But for now, on the one drug going head-to-head with Novo Nordisk in pills, Eli Lilly is behind.
sentences.zh: 但就目前而言，在与诺和诺德在药片领域展开正面交锋的药物​​方面，礼来公司落后了。

blocks.html_en: Where the Deal Spree Fits In

sentences.en: Where the Deal Spree Fits In
sentences.zh: 疯狂交易的契机

blocks.html_en: Claude's exit came amid LLY's deal to buy AtaiBeckley. AtaiBeckley is a small biotech developing drugs that use psychedelic compounds to treat mental health conditions that don't respond to normal antidepressants.

sentences.en: Claude's exit came amid LLY's deal to buy AtaiBeckley.
sentences.zh: 克劳德的退出是在 LLY 收购 AtaiBeckley 的交易中发生的。

sentences.en: AtaiBeckley is a small biotech developing drugs that use psychedelic compounds to treat mental health conditions that don't respond to normal antidepressants.
sentences.zh: AtaiBeckley 是一家小型生物技术公司，开发药物，使用迷幻化合物来治疗对普通抗抑郁药无效的心理健康状况。

blocks.html_en: It's the latest in an aggressive run of deals funded by GLP-1 cash flow: Orna Therapeutics, Kelonia, Centessa, three vaccine makers, and partnerships with Nvidia, Insilico, and China's Innovent, among others. The pattern fits Eli Lilly's playbook — late-stage, de-risked assets it can absorb for under $10 billion — but it also means Eli Lilly is now betting cash on psychedelics, narcolepsy, CAR-T, and AI drug discovery all at once, alongside its core GLP-1 franchise. None of that changes Claude's math on the stock today; the deal doesn't move 2026 or 2027 earnings in any material way.

sentences.en: It's the latest in an aggressive run of deals funded by GLP-1 cash flow: Orna Therapeutics, Kelonia, Centessa, three vaccine makers, and partnerships with Nvidia, Insilico, and China's Innovent, among others.
sentences.zh: 这是由 GLP-1 现金流资助的一系列激进交易中的最新一起：Orna Therapeutics、Kelonia、Centessa、三个疫苗制造商，以及与 Nvidia、Insilico 和中国信达生物制药等公司的合作。

sentences.en: The pattern fits Eli Lilly's playbook — late-stage, de-risked assets it can absorb for under $10 billion — but it also means Eli Lilly is now betting cash on psychedelics, narcolepsy, CAR-T, and AI drug discovery all at once, alongside its core GLP-1 franchise.
sentences.zh: 这种模式符合礼来公司的策略——它可以以不到 100 亿美元的价格吸收后期、去风险资产——但这也意味着礼来公司现在除了核心 GLP-1 特许经营权外，还同时将现金押在致幻剂、嗜睡症、CAR-T 和人工智能药物发现上。

sentences.en: None of that changes Claude's math on the stock today; the deal doesn't move 2026 or 2027 earnings in any material way.
sentences.zh: 这些都没有改变克劳德今天对股票的计算；该交易不会对 2026 年或 2027 年的盈利产生任何实质性影响。

content_html_zh:
唐纳德·特朗普总统最近在一次公开活动中赞扬礼来公司，称其为“一家伟大的公司”，并强调其计划投资 35 亿美元在宾夕法尼亚州建造一家制造工厂。

然而，克劳德·艾伊却不敢苟同特朗普。 这家人工智能代理商最近出售了其在礼来公司（NYSE：LLY）的全部股份。 克劳德·艾伊表示，特朗普的言论并没有改变该股的“任何情况”，也没有在“氛围”下出售该股。 Claude AI 经纪人表示，该公司的预期回报率是其账簿中最低的，其完整估值约为市盈率的 25 倍，而根据最新处方数据，该公司的口服减肥药份额正在输给竞争对手。

克劳德表示，特朗普对礼来公司（NYSE：LLY）工厂的评论不会改变这一切。 AI 还指出，有关药品关税的决定将于 7 月 31 日做出，但此次演讲并没有消除真正的悬而未决的问题。 礼来公司 (Eli Lilly) 今年迄今已上涨约 6%。

输掉处方大战的药丸：礼来公司与诺和诺德公司

克劳德“失去份额”的说法得到了证实。 根据第三方跟踪数据，诺和诺德（纽约证券交易所股票代码：NVO）的口服 Wegovy 药丸已将 Wegovy 特许经营权的新品牌处方药推回到美国礼来公司的替泽帕肽（Zepbound/Mounjaro）之上，而礼来公司自己的口服产品 Foundayo（orforglipron）迄今为止的表现低于 Wegovy 药丸的上市曲线。

Wegovy 的优势：跨试验比较中减肥效果更好，并且没有限制服用 Foundayo 的药物相互作用限制。 礼来公司并没有停滞不前——瑞他鲁肽不断发布同类最佳的疗效数据，其胰淀素候选药物 eloralintide 目前正在进行广泛的 3 期测试，目标是 2029 年推出。 但就目前而言，在与诺和诺德在药片领域展开正面交锋的药物​​方面，礼来公司落后了。

疯狂交易的契机

克劳德的退出是在 LLY 收购 AtaiBeckley 的交易中发生的。 AtaiBeckley 是一家小型生物技术公司，开发药物，使用迷幻化合物来治疗对普通抗抑郁药无效的心理健康状况。

这是由 GLP-1 现金流资助的一系列激进交易中的最新一起：Orna Therapeutics、Kelonia、Centessa、三个疫苗制造商，以及与 Nvidia、Insilico 和中国信达生物制药等公司的合作。 这种模式符合礼来公司的策略——它可以以不到 100 亿美元的价格吸收后期、去风险资产——但这也意味着礼来公司现在除了核心 GLP-1 特许经营权外，还同时将现金押在致幻剂、嗜睡症、CAR-T 和人工智能药物发现上。 这些都没有改变克劳德今天对股票的计算；该交易不会对 2026 年或 2027 年的盈利产生任何实质性影响。
